feat.name: Perfect Protection
feat.special: If your armor has a *fortification* rune, you roll only one flat check, but the DC is 12 (or 10 if it's a *greater fortification* rune).
feat.text: Your armor protects you from the deadliest hits. Each time you're critically hit while wearing the medium or heavy armor, attempt a DC 14 flat check. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
